heading: Survivor annuities for previous spouses
label: 2036 Survivor annuities for previous spouses
text: The Director shall prescribe regulations under which a previous spouse who is divorced after , from a participant, former participant, or retired participant shall be eligible for a survivor annuity to the same extent and, to the greatest extent practicable, under the same conditions (including reductions to be made in the annuity of the participant) applicable to former spouses (as defined in ) of participants in the Civil Service Retirement and Disability System (CSRS) as prescribed by the Civil Service Retirement Spouse Equity Act of 1984.September 29, 1988section 8331(23) of title 5
notes: References in TextThe Civil Service Retirement Spouse Equity Act of 1984, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1984 Amendment note set out under , Government Organization and Employees, and Tables.Pub.
